zh.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton是Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight的女兒，出生。她和Sir Edward de Warenne至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton是Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight的女儿，出生。她和Sir Edward de Warenne至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Skeyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name mainly from Skelton in Cumberland, or any of various places called Skelton in Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, and East Yorkshire. The placenames probably all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, with initial Sk-, instead of Sh-, due to Scandinavian influence. However, in some cases, the first element may be a lost river name, from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’; compare Skelding . This English surname has been established in Queen's County [Laois], Ireland, since the 16th century.

variants.name: Skelding
meanings: English: habitational name from Skelding (Yorkshire). The place takes its name from the river Skell, itself from Old Norse skjallr ‘resounding’, + Old English denu ‘valley’. In addition, the name may come from Skeldon (Ayrshire), although there is a lack of evidence for a historic presence in this part of Scotland.

variants.name: Skilton
meanings: English (Surrey): probably a variant of Skelton , though in some cases the name may be a variant of Shilton, a habitational name from Shilton (Warwickshire, Oxfordshire) or Earl Shilton (Leicestershire), from Old English scelf, scylf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton was born as the daughter of Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. She had at least 1 son with Sir Edward de Warenne.

fr.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton est née, fille de Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Edward de Warenne.

de.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton wurde, als Tochter von Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Edward de Warenne mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton è nata il come figlia di Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Edward de Warenne.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude de SkeytonはSir Richard DE SKEYTON Knightの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Edward de Warenneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton(은)는 Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Edward de Warenne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton nasceu filha de Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Edward de Warenne.

ru.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton родилась. Её отца звали Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Edward de Warenne.

es.lifeSummary: Maude de Skeyton nació como hija de Sir Richard DE SKEYTON Knight. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Edward de Warenne.
